sections.paragraph:
Original: קנז

Transliteration: qenaz

Phonetic: ken-az'

BDB Definition:

Kenaz = "hunter"
  1. son of Eliphaz and grandson of Esau; one of the dukes of Edom
  2. a brother of Caleb and father of Othniel

Origin: probably from an unused root meaning to hunt

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
